status: Spotify is ready for API secrets. Add Spotify GitHub secrets to publish live listening and playlists.

current.title: Spotify not connected yet
current.meta: Live listening needs Spotify API secrets
current.note: The browser will only read generated data/spotify.json.

playlists.title: Public playlists pending
playlists.note: Add SPOTIFY_CLIENT_ID, SPOTIFY_CLIENT_SECRET, and SPOTIFY_REFRESH_TOKEN in GitHub Actions secrets.
